text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for the trouble, Nakayama Festa. I
see that your game was not in violation of school
rules.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Now hold on just a second. An apology's not
gonna cut it, Prez.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: If time is money, then you just cost me big time. On account of your screwup, to boot.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
It only seems fair that you compensate me for my
trouble.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Are you trying to threaten me?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Oh, I wouldn't dream of it. Just floating a suggestion. But if you did want to settle this fair and square... I sure wouldn't say no.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Emperors don't steal from others and run, do
they? They'd just be tyrants in that case.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, well. It seems I have no room to back down
gracefully.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Very well, I accept. What is it you want?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Chess. You can take white.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You'd give me the first move, knowing how
experienced a player I am? You're either
audacious or simply foolhardy.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I'm just in it for the love of the game, Prez. All I
want is to go toe to toe, no holds barred.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Now, let's get started, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
This time, I'll play white. Let's see what you
make... of this!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(She sacrificed her pawn... She's playing the
King's Gambit!)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(No matter how I move, I'll get bogged down in a
melee. This game is...)

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Chaos! Disorder! Heh heh heh! Now we're playing chess!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Fascinating!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
And that's a wrap. Guess that's why you're the
best, Prez. Still, I've had my fun.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Next time I've got some time to kill, maybe I'll
come steal some of yours.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I eked out a win, in the end. Still...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: (What a game! My fingertips are still tingling!)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Hahaha...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I am in your debt, Nakayama Festa.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now my mind feels as sharp as a freshly honed
blade!
